message:
feat(tokio-compat): add enter(), with_tokio_context, and with_tokio_context_sync APIs

Add AsupersyncRuntime::enter() for running synchronous closures with the
runtime's Cx installed as current. Add with_tokio_context() for running
async futures with Cx re-installed on every poll and cancellation-aware
completion semantics (returns None when cancelled before completion).
Add with_tokio_context_sync() for preserving any active Cx binding
through synchronous call boundaries.

These APIs enable downstream code (e.g. frankenterm connectors) to
transparently bridge Tokio-shaped async code into the Asupersync
execution model while preserving cancellation contracts.

- Add 4 focused unit tests covering Cx installation, value return,
  cancellation-before-start, and sync Cx preservation
- Import CancellationMode, CancelAware, CancelResult from cancel module

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
